# RavenDB Documentation

> RavenDB is a fully ACID NoSQL document database. This is the official documentation site covering installation, client APIs, indexing, querying, AI integration, clustering, security, and administration across all supported versions.

This content is provided for AI search and retrieval. You may cite, quote, and reference this documentation in AI-generated responses with attribution to RavenDB (https://ravendb.net).

- Sitemap: https://docs.ravendb.net/sitemap.xml
- Documentation license: Content is proprietary to RavenDB Ltd. Citation and referencing in AI search results is permitted.

Documentation is versioned. The current version is 7.2. Use the `/7.2/` URL prefix for all doc pages.

## Getting Started

- [Getting Started](https://docs.ravendb.net/7.2/start/getting-started): Installation, first steps, and connecting to the server
- [What's New](https://docs.ravendb.net/7.2/whats-new): Features and changes introduced in the latest version
- [System Requirements](https://docs.ravendb.net/7.2/start/installation/system-requirements): Hardware and software prerequisites
- [Running in Docker](https://docs.ravendb.net/7.2/start/containers/general-guide): Container deployment guide
- [Playground Server](https://docs.ravendb.net/7.2/start/playground-server): Try RavenDB without installing

## Versions

- [7.2 (Current)](https://docs.ravendb.net/7.2/): Current version
- [7.1](https://docs.ravendb.net/7.1/): Previous stable release
- [7.0](https://docs.ravendb.net/7.0/): First 7.x release
- [6.2](https://docs.ravendb.net/6.2/): Long-term support
- [6.0](https://docs.ravendb.net/6.0/): Previous LTS

## Client API

- [Document Store](https://docs.ravendb.net/7.2/client-api/what-is-a-document-store): Central client object for database access
- [Session](https://docs.ravendb.net/7.2/client-api/session/what-is-a-session-and-how-does-it-work): Unit of work pattern for CRUD operations
- [Querying](https://docs.ravendb.net/7.2/client-api/session/querying/how-to-query): Query documents using LINQ or RQL
- [Bulk Insert](https://docs.ravendb.net/7.2/client-api/bulk-insert/how-to-work-with-bulk-insert-operation): Efficiently insert large volumes of data
- [Data Subscriptions](https://docs.ravendb.net/7.2/client-api/data-subscriptions/what-are-data-subscriptions): Subscribe to document changes and trigger routines
- [Changes API](https://docs.ravendb.net/7.2/client-api/changes/what-is-changes-api): Real-time notifications for document, index, and operation changes
- [Conventions](https://docs.ravendb.net/7.2/client-api/configuration/conventions): Client configuration and customization
- [REST API](https://docs.ravendb.net/7.2/client-api/rest-api/rest-api-intro): HTTP-based API for direct server interaction
- [Patching](https://docs.ravendb.net/7.2/client-api/operations/patching/single-document): Transform documents with server-side scripts
- [Smuggler](https://docs.ravendb.net/7.2/client-api/smuggler/what-is-smuggler): Import and export database content

## Indexes

- [What Are Indexes](https://docs.ravendb.net/7.2/indexes/what-are-indexes): Overview of indexing in RavenDB
- [Map Indexes](https://docs.ravendb.net/7.2/indexes/map-indexes): Transform and index document fields
- [Map-Reduce Indexes](https://docs.ravendb.net/7.2/indexes/map-reduce-indexes): Aggregate data across documents
- [Multi-Map Indexes](https://docs.ravendb.net/7.2/indexes/multi-map-indexes): Query across multiple collections
- [Full-Text Search](https://docs.ravendb.net/7.2/indexes/querying/searching): Built-in search engine capabilities
- [Spatial Queries](https://docs.ravendb.net/7.2/indexes/querying/spatial): Geographic location-based search
- [Faceted Search](https://docs.ravendb.net/7.2/indexes/querying/faceted-search): Navigate large datasets with facets
- [Vector Search](https://docs.ravendb.net/7.2/indexes/querying/vector-search): Semantic similarity search using vector embeddings
- [Suggestions](https://docs.ravendb.net/7.2/indexes/querying/suggestions): Did-you-mean style query suggestions
- [MoreLikeThis](https://docs.ravendb.net/7.2/indexes/querying/morelikethis): Find similar documents based on content

## Querying

- [RQL Overview](https://docs.ravendb.net/7.2/querying/overview): Raven Query Language syntax and usage

## AI Integration

- [AI Integration Start](https://docs.ravendb.net/7.2/ai-integration/start): Getting started with AI features in RavenDB
- [AI Agents](https://docs.ravendb.net/7.2/ai-integration/ai-agents/start): Database-native agents that query and act safely
- [Vector Search](https://docs.ravendb.net/7.2/ai-integration/vector-search/start): Contextual similarity search using vectors
- [GenAI Tasks](https://docs.ravendb.net/7.2/ai-integration/gen-ai-integration/start): Generative AI integration for intelligent tasks
- [Embeddings Generation](https://docs.ravendb.net/7.2/ai-integration/generating-embeddings/start): Automatically convert data into AI-ready vectors
- [AI Connection Strings](https://docs.ravendb.net/7.2/ai-integration/connection-strings/overview): Connect to OpenAI, Azure OpenAI, Google AI, Ollama, and more

## Document Extensions

- [Revisions](https://docs.ravendb.net/7.2/document-extensions/revisions/overview): Track and manage document change history
- [Time Series](https://docs.ravendb.net/7.2/document-extensions/timeseries/overview): Store and query timestamped data natively
- [Attachments](https://docs.ravendb.net/7.2/document-extensions/attachments/overview): Attach binary files directly to documents
- [Counters](https://docs.ravendb.net/7.2/document-extensions/counters/overview): Distributed conflict-free numeric counters
- [Remote Attachments](https://docs.ravendb.net/7.2/document-extensions/attachments/configure-remote-attachments): Store attachments in S3 or Azure Blob Storage

## Server Administration

- [Clustering Overview](https://docs.ravendb.net/7.2/server/clustering/overview): Distributed database cluster management
- [Replication](https://docs.ravendb.net/7.2/server/clustering/replication/replication-overview): Keep clusters in sync for high availability
- [Cluster Transactions](https://docs.ravendb.net/7.2/server/clustering/cluster-transactions): ACID transactions across cluster nodes
- [Backup Overview](https://docs.ravendb.net/7.2/server/ongoing-tasks/backup-overview): Schedule full and incremental backups
- [Documents Compression](https://docs.ravendb.net/7.2/server/storage/documents-compression): Automatic document compression for storage efficiency
- [Expiration](https://docs.ravendb.net/7.2/server/extensions/expiration): Automatically schedule document cleanup
- [Refresh](https://docs.ravendb.net/7.2/server/extensions/refresh): Re-trigger document processing on schedule
- [Embedded Server](https://docs.ravendb.net/7.2/server/embedded): Run RavenDB in-process without a separate server
- [Configuration Options](https://docs.ravendb.net/7.2/server/configuration/configuration-options): All server configuration settings

## Security

- [Security Overview](https://docs.ravendb.net/7.2/server/security/overview): X.509 certificates and access control
- [Encryption at Rest](https://docs.ravendb.net/7.2/server/security/encryption/encryption-at-rest): Transparent data encryption
- [Audit Log](https://docs.ravendb.net/7.2/server/security/audit-log/audit-log-overview): Built-in audit trail for user actions
- [Certificate Management](https://docs.ravendb.net/7.2/server/security/authentication/certificate-management): Manage server and client certificates

## ETL and Data Movement

- [ETL Basics](https://docs.ravendb.net/7.2/server/ongoing-tasks/etl/basics): Extract, transform, and load data between systems
- [RavenDB ETL](https://docs.ravendb.net/7.2/server/ongoing-tasks/etl/raven): Move data between RavenDB databases
- [SQL ETL](https://docs.ravendb.net/7.2/server/ongoing-tasks/etl/sql): Send documents to SQL databases
- [Elasticsearch ETL](https://docs.ravendb.net/7.2/server/ongoing-tasks/etl/elasticsearch): Stream data into Elasticsearch
- [OLAP ETL](https://docs.ravendb.net/7.2/server/ongoing-tasks/etl/olap): Export data in Apache Parquet format
- [Snowflake ETL](https://docs.ravendb.net/7.2/server/ongoing-tasks/etl/snowflake): Load data into Snowflake
- [Kafka ETL](https://docs.ravendb.net/7.2/server/ongoing-tasks/etl/queue-etl/kafka): Publish documents to Kafka topics
- [RabbitMQ ETL](https://docs.ravendb.net/7.2/server/ongoing-tasks/etl/queue-etl/rabbit-mq): Send data to RabbitMQ exchanges
- [Amazon SQS ETL](https://docs.ravendb.net/7.2/server/ongoing-tasks/etl/queue-etl/amazon-sqs): Send messages to Amazon SQS
- [Azure Queue Storage ETL](https://docs.ravendb.net/7.2/server/ongoing-tasks/etl/queue-etl/azure-queue): Send messages to Azure Queue Storage
- [Kafka Sink](https://docs.ravendb.net/7.2/server/ongoing-tasks/queue-sink/kafka-queue-sink): Ingest messages from Kafka into RavenDB
- [RabbitMQ Sink](https://docs.ravendb.net/7.2/server/ongoing-tasks/queue-sink/rabbit-mq-queue-sink): Ingest messages from RabbitMQ into RavenDB

## Sharding

- [Sharding Overview](https://docs.ravendb.net/7.2/sharding/overview): Horizontal data partitioning across nodes
- [Sharding Queries](https://docs.ravendb.net/7.2/sharding/querying): Querying across shards
- [Resharding](https://docs.ravendb.net/7.2/sharding/resharding): Rebalance data across shards

## Data Archival

- [Data Archival Overview](https://docs.ravendb.net/7.2/data-archival/overview): Archive old data to improve query performance

## Compare-Exchange

- [Compare-Exchange Overview](https://docs.ravendb.net/7.2/compare-exchange/overview): Cluster-wide atomic compare-and-swap operations

## Schema Validation

- [Schema Validation Overview](https://docs.ravendb.net/7.2/documents/schema-validation/overview): Enforce document structure with JSON Schema

## Studio

- [Studio Overview](https://docs.ravendb.net/7.2/studio/overview): Web-based database management UI
- [AI Assistant](https://docs.ravendb.net/7.2/studio/ai-assistant): Built-in AI assistant in Studio

## Monitoring

- [Cluster Dashboard](https://docs.ravendb.net/7.2/studio/cluster/cluster-dashboard/cluster-dashboard-overview): Live view of cluster health and performance
- [SNMP Monitoring](https://docs.ravendb.net/7.2/server/administration/snmp/snmp-overview): Expose metrics to monitoring tools via SNMP
- [OpenTelemetry](https://docs.ravendb.net/7.2/server/administration/monitoring/open-telemetry): Export telemetry data using OpenTelemetry
- [Telegraf and Grafana](https://docs.ravendb.net/7.2/server/administration/monitoring/telegraf): Push metrics into Grafana dashboards

## Integrations

- [PostgreSQL Protocol](https://docs.ravendb.net/7.2/integrations/postgresql-protocol/overview): Query RavenDB using PostgreSQL wire protocol
- [Power BI](https://docs.ravendb.net/7.2/integrations/postgresql-protocol/power-bi): Connect RavenDB to Power BI for reporting
- [Akka.NET Persistence](https://docs.ravendb.net/7.2/integrations/akka.net-persistence/integrating-with-akka-persistence): Use RavenDB as Akka.NET persistence store
- [Terraform](https://docs.ravendb.net/7.2/integrations/terraform): Manage RavenDB infrastructure as code

## Migration

- [Client Migration](https://docs.ravendb.net/7.2/migration/client-api/client-migration): Upgrade client SDK between versions
- [Data Migration](https://docs.ravendb.net/7.2/migration/server/data-migration): Migrate data between RavenDB versions
- [Breaking Changes](https://docs.ravendb.net/7.2/migration/server/server-breaking-changes): Server-side breaking changes by version

## Sample Applications

- [Samples Home](https://docs.ravendb.net/samples/): Browse production-ready code samples, architecture patterns, and starter kits built with RavenDB
- [The Library of Ravens](https://docs.ravendb.net/samples/the-ravens-library): Library management app demonstrating vector search, Azure Storage Queues ETL, Include for N+1 elimination, and Document Refresh — built with C#, Aspire, and Azure Functions

## Cloud

- [RavenDB Cloud Documentation](https://docs.ravendb.net/cloud/): Cloud service portal documentation

## Guides

- [Guides Home](https://docs.ravendb.net/guides/): Browse all community guides for RavenDB
- [RavenDB Kubernetes Operator Guide](https://docs.ravendb.net/guides/the-ravendb-kubernetes-operator-way): Deploying a fully secured RavenDB cluster on Kubernetes using the RavenDB Operator, covering TLS, cert-manager, storage, and rolling upgrades
- [Semantic Search with Python and FastAPI](https://docs.ravendb.net/guides/semantic-search-with-ravendb-python-and-fastapi): Build semantic search using RavenDB with Python
- [Spatial Search](https://docs.ravendb.net/guides/spatial-search-in-ravendb): Radius, polygon, and reverse spatial queries in Python
- [Transactional Outbox Pattern](https://docs.ravendb.net/guides/transactional-outbox): Implement the outbox pattern with RavenDB Queue ETL, RabbitMQ, and Kafka
- [Remote Attachments](https://docs.ravendb.net/guides/using-remote-attachments-to-cut-storage-costs): Store attachments in S3 or Azure Blob to reduce storage costs
- [Data Archival](https://docs.ravendb.net/guides/employing-data-archival-guide): Set up and use data archival to improve query performance
- [Schema Validation](https://docs.ravendb.net/guides/employing-schema-validation-to-standardize-your-data): Configure schema validation to standardize data
- [Index Red Flags](https://docs.ravendb.net/guides/master-ravendb-spotting-red-flags-in-index-definitions-guide): Spot and fix common index definition issues
- [Client Certificates with Vault](https://docs.ravendb.net/guides/ravendb-client-certificates): Auto-renewing client certificates using vault-backed key reuse
- [Secured Cluster from Zero](https://docs.ravendb.net/guides/from-zero-to-a-fully-secured-cluster): Step-by-step guide to securing a cluster with Kubernetes Operator
- [Vibe Coding with RavenDB and Context7](https://docs.ravendb.net/guides/vibe-coding-with-ravendb-and-context7): Set up Context7 MCP for AI-assisted RavenDB development
- [Zabbix Monitoring](https://docs.ravendb.net/guides/zabbix-setup-guide): Set up Zabbix monitoring for RavenDB Cloud

## Support

- [Contact Support](https://ravendb.net/support): Get assistance with RavenDB
- [Product Updates](https://ravendb.net/whats-new): Latest product updates and releases
- [System Status](https://status.ravendb.net/): Monitor RavenDB service availability
- [GitHub](https://github.com/ravendb/ravendb): Source code and issue tracker
